chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 319 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1488/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1489/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Petitioner, namely Mansoor Ali Khoso present in person, does not press instant Constitutional Petition along with listed applications and submits that he will avail his alternate remedy before the competent Court of law having jurisdiction. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
